zh.lifeSummary: 當Dionisia de Tilly於大約1151年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾哈特菲爾德時，她的父親Otes de Tilly27歲，母親Mabel FitzRaven33歲。她於1182年2月與Henry de Puiset結婚。她去世於1212年之後在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dionisia de Tilly于大约1151年出生在英国英格兰越可爾哈特菲爾德时，她的父亲Otes de Tilly27岁，母亲Mabel FitzRaven33岁。她于1182年2月与Henry de Puiset结婚。她去世于1212年之后在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tilly
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from a shortened form of Tilling, which itself is a patronymic from Till .
English and Irish: variant of   Tilley  .

variants.name: Till
meanings: English: from the Middle English female personal name Till, a pet form of Old French Matild(e) (in its Latin form Matilda), which was an alternative to Maud; see Maude 2. A diminutive form occurs in Tillotson .

nameMeanings.name: Dionisia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Denise ; see Dennis . This form was in use in northern England from the 14th to the 17th century; the short form Dye is the source of the surname Dyson.

en.lifeSummary: When Dionisia de Tilly was born about 1151, in Hatfield, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Otes de Tilly, was 27 and her mother, Mabel FitzRaven, was 33. She married Henry de Puiset in February 1182. She died after 1212, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dionisia de Tilly est née environ 1151, à Hatfield, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Otes de Tilly, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mabel FitzRaven, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Henry de Puiset en février 1182. Elle est décédée après 1212, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dionisia de Tilly um 1151 in Hatfield, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Otes de Tilly 27 und ihre Mutter Mabel FitzRaven 33. Sie hat im Februar 1182 Henry de Puiset geheiratet. Sie starb nach 1212 in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dionisia de Tilly è nata il circa 1151 nel Hatfield, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Otes de Tilly, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Mabel FitzRaven, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Henry de Puiset nel febbraio 1182. Morì dopo il 1212, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Dionisia de Tillyが約1151年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハトフィールドで生まれた時，父Otes de Tillyは27歳，母Mabel FitzRavenは33歳であった。1182年2月にHenry de Puisetと結婚した。彼女は1212年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dionisia de Tilly(이)가 대략 1151년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 하트필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Otes de Tilly(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mabel FitzRaven(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1182년 2월 Henry de Puiset(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1212년 이후 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dionisia de Tilly nasceu aproximadamente 1151, em Hatfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Otes de Tilly, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mabel FitzRaven, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry de Puiset em fevereiro de 1182. Ela faleceu após 1212, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dionisia de Tilly родилась около 1151 г. в местности хатфиелд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Otes de Tilly было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mabel FitzRaven, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry de Puiset февраль 1182 г. Она умерла после 1212 г. в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dionisia de Tilly nació aproximadamente 1151, en Hatfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Otes de Tilly, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Mabel FitzRaven, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Henry de Puiset en febrero de 1182. Murió después de 1212, en su pueblo.
